title: Mobile app connection status change reflected on the Cloud
scenario: Cloud connection status (green/red indicator) is not accurately reflected across Device Users, Inventory, and Device profile pages based on mobile app login/logout state
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile Android app and log in with valid credentials.
Navigate to the Home screen and confirm the app shows a connected status (green mark).
Go to the Device Users page and verify the connection status displays a green mark (connected).
Navigate to the Inventory page and confirm the connection status shows a green mark (connected).
Open the Device profile page and verify the connection status displays a green mark (connected).
Return to the Home screen and log out of the app.
After logout, navigate to the Device Users page and verify the connection status displays a red mark (disconnected).
Navigate to the Inventory page and confirm the connection status shows a red mark (disconnected).
Open the Device profile page and verify the connection status displays a red mark (disconnected).
expected: When logged in, the connection status shows a green mark (connected) consistently across the Device Users page, Inventory page, and Device profile page. When logged out, the connection status shows a red mark (disconnected) consistently across all three pages.
